calendar.matters: HEARING ON DAVID LAMAR JACKSON'S PETITION FOR CHANGE OF NAME

HEARING ON DAVID LAMAR JACKSON'S PETITION FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jun-17-2026 Continued To Jul-17-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: The matter came on for Change of name and gender of Petitioner David Lemar Jackson.

Dept.505; Judge: Michelle Tong; Clerk: D. Carter; Matter Not Reported

Petitioner David Lemar Jackson appeared in pro per.

Petition for change of name and gender filed December 28, 2023.

The Court addresses the petitioner.

The Petitioner provides testimony.

The Court is asking the Petitioner to go to the Central Warrant Bureau and get a prinout stating that the active warrant that appears on the CLETS printout is discharged.

This matter is continued to July 17, 2026 at 9:00am in dept. 505.
